message:
feat: add vector_norm and matrix_norm for NumPy 2.0 parity

Implement np.linalg.vector_norm and np.linalg.matrix_norm functions
introduced in NumPy 2.0 for cleaner, more explicit norm computation:

- vector_norm(ord, axis, keepdims): compute vector norms with support
  for L1, L2, inf, -inf, 0 (count nonzero), and arbitrary p-norms
- matrix_norm(ord, keepdims): compute matrix norms including Frobenius,
  1-norm (max col sum), inf-norm (max row sum), and nuclear norm

Both functions support keepdims parameter for shape preservation.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
